positive: A stylized, geometric forest landscape, rendered in a clean, minimalist woodcut etching style. The scene features silhouetted abstract trees and meandering paths against a solid background, evoking both nature and retro-futurism. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, mustard yellow, and off-white. Composition must be central and balanced, with strong, crisp lines and high contrast. The print must be flat, vector-like, and immediately scalable for textile printing. Include small, repeating celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized stars scattered throughout the design. Flat design, high contrast, perfect composition, woodblock print aesthetic, symmetrical, pop art.
negative: photorealistic, depth of field, blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, grain, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fuzzy, messy, grunge, realistic lighting
